changed: PublicContentBodyDto.FromStoredFields now returns markdown only when markdown exists, otherwise html only.
Added PublicContentBodyDtoTests for both-source and html-fallback behavior.
Updated Postgres public work detail contract expectation to omit html when markdown is present.

goalVerification.goal: Reduce heavy public detail payload and serialization work by returning the minimum public body form.
goalVerification.result: Public detail DTO no longer returns both html and markdown when both stored columns contain values.
goalVerification.expectedLoadTestImpact: Lower response bytes and JSON serialization/allocation work on markdown-backed detail reads.

validations.details: Failed before implementation because Html was not null; passed 2/2 after implementation.

risks: Postgres-backed contract assertion was not executed locally because Docker/Testcontainers is unavailable.
Large markdown payloads remain large; this only removes duplicate body source payload where both fields are present.
recommendation: Open a PR to dev and rely on CI to run Docker-backed Postgres tests before merge, then compare real backend load-test latency, response bytes, and GC metrics.
